data.body: PLAN-REVIEW CONVERGING. Epic: r1 6 BLOCKs -> r2 1 BLOCK (AC7 docs effort-framed) -> r3 pending (fixed: named ADR docs/adr/NNNN-opcert-asymmetric.md + test-asserted strings; propagated to 6a89). 368c: r2 1 BLOCK (material fp undefined) -> r3 pending (fixed: bind existing plan_review.pass1.material_fingerprint 16-hex sha256 over {ticket_id,description,file_impact,children}, opaque to substrate). Bg jobs: bzsuxo7pg epic-r3, bcawg9sdd 368c-r3. RED test drafts for 368c staged in job tmp (test_attest_opcert.py happy + _heldout.py adversarial). Claim 368c once both PASS.
